title: Koniag Commits $50,000 to Support Kodiak Island COVID-19 Efforts
summary: Announces any Tribal Relief Funding awarded to Koniag will support Shareholders and communities Kodiak, Alaska – Koniag is committing $50,000 to support in-region needs, particularly food security, related to COVID-19. This follows region-wide meetings with tribes, village corporations, and non-prof...
